title: dodecatheon meadia var. genuinum
intro: Dodecatheon meadia var. genuinum, also known as the Western Red-Flowered Rocket or Red Rocket, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Dodecatheon meadia var. genuinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a medicinal tea, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
